mod.kingdoms.name: Kingdoms
kingdoms.access_tool.not_member: Join a faction before using the Management Key.
kingdoms.access_tool.not_owned: You can only manage containers in your own territory.
kingdoms.protection.no_break: You cannot break blocks in this faction claim.
kingdoms.protection.no_place: You cannot place blocks in this faction claim.
kingdoms.protection.no_interact: You cannot interact with blocks in this faction claim.
